ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Continued To Jan-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 6, 2016, is admitted to probate. Elena Garca is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone/Santos. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Continued To Jun-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
